case.question: Which option is the exact left-right mirror of the reference panel?
case.prompt: Create one BabyVision-style visual reasoning benchmark image. Use a clean printed worksheet style on a white background, crisp geometric shapes, small labels, no photorealism, no watermark, and no explanatory answer key. It must be unambiguous and solvable from the image alone. Do not include the written question in the image. Draw a reference panel containing a small asymmetric arrangement of arrows, dots, triangles, and a crescent. Below draw four candidate panels A-D. Option A must be the exact horizontal mirror of the reference. Other options should rotate one symbol, miss one dot, or mirror only part of the panel.
